prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-DIECAST-EMT-50-HPN Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Deluxe 50pc Emergency EMT Fire Rescue Micro Wheels Kids Diecast Toy Car Play Set Description: Deluxe 50pc Emergency EMT Fire Rescue Micro Wheels Kids Diecast Toy Car Play Set

Deluxe 50pc Diecast City Construction Micro Wheels Kid Complete Toy Car Play Set

Vroom Vroom. Create the ultimate toy vehicle construction toy play set cars.

This set comes with construction cars in assorted colors, all of which are decorated like real race cars. In the set we've included white, blue, green, yellow, orange, red and black cars in different shades and styles. Each car is painted in a cool race car style, and all are of a die cast construction.

These cars are durable so they are ideal for indoor or outdoor play. Young kids will love zooming around and racing each other with this huge set of cars. This is a great gift idea for young kids and die cast race car collectors alike. Search Terms: christmas toys race car playset toy cars Features: - Fun Emergency Themed Toy Cars & Traffic Equipment - Die Cast Metal & Durable Plastic - Trucks, Cars, Traffic Signs, Helicopter & More - Great Gift Idea for Kids - Ideal holiday stiocking stuffers and gifts for boys === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
